results.title: Enemy
results.overview: A mild-mannered college professor discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

results.title: Walking with the Enemy
results.overview: Regent Horthy is the leader of Hungary and a German ally, but his favorable standing with Hitler changes as the war comes to an end. Forced to cede Hungary’s power or else witness the execution of his son, Regent Horthy gives up control of his country to the Nazis, who quickly move Hungarians to ghettos and death camps, with no hope in sight. But the despair changes when a young man named Elek emerges. Separated from his family during the relocations and aided by the woman he loves , Elek defies the enemy by becoming one of them. In a race against time, disguised as a Nazi Officer he embarks on a mission to save his family and thousands of his countrymen.

results.title: Bomb Girls: Facing the Enemy
results.overview: It is the Spring of 1943 and the Battle for the Atlantic rages as an Axis victory seems inevitable. The women of Vic Mu – Gladys, Lorna, Kate, Betty and Vera – band together in a tight bond of support and friendship.

results.title: Seal Team Eight: Behind Enemy Lines
results.original_title: Seal Team Eight: Behind Enemy Lines
results.overview: Seal Team Eight must fight their way deep into Africa's Congo, decommission a secret uranium mine, and stop our most dangerous enemy from smuggling weapon's grade yellow-cake out of the country.

results.title: Still the Enemy Within
results.overview: A documentary about the 1984 Miner's Strike which changed Britain forever.

results.title: Lucid Dreams: The Making of Enemy
results.original_title: Lucid Dreams: The Making of Enemy
results.overview: The cast and crew of 'Enemy' guide the audience through the making of the film and the possible meanings behind its enigmatic imagery.

results.title: Arch Enemy: [2014] Krasnodar, Russia
results.overview: Arch Enemy at Arena Hall, Krasnodar, Russia  Enemy Within  War Eternal  Ravenous  Revolution Begins  My Apocalypse  You Will Know My Name  Bloodstained Cross  Under Black Flags We March  As the Pages Burn  Dead Eyes See No Future  No Gods, No Masters  Dead Bury Their Dead  We Will Rise  Khaos Overture  Yesterday Is Dead and Gone  Blood on Your Hands  Snow Bound  Nemesis  Fields of Desolation

results.title: Partner With The Enemy
results.overview: In the midst of the ever-fraught Israeli-Palestinian political landscape, two women, one Israeli and one Palestinian, attempt the seemingly impossible: to build a business together. Fighting against societal and family pressure, anti-normalization currents and a chauvinistic, male-dominated industry, the two combine forces to create a logistics company which helps Palestinian businessmen to navigate the everyday absurdities of Israeli control of the West Bank. But while they help their clients to overcome the obstacles of Israeli occupation, the divisions between them threaten to tear their partnership apart. Can the bond between them overcome the impossible?

results.title: Behind Enemy Lines: Making Gunpoint
results.overview: A short documentary about the making of Peter Graham's 'Gunpoint', featuring an interview with Graham.

results.title: Enemy Lines: The Emmure Documentary
results.overview: American metal band Emmure tours Europe as they finish writing material for their upcoming sixth album, Eternal Enemies. before heading into the studio.

results.title: Public Enemy Live at the Metro Theatre
results.original_title: Public Enemy Live at the Metro Theatre

results.title: Public Enemy - Live At Metropolis Studio
results.original_title: Public Enemy - Live At Metropolis Studio

results.title: Enemy of the Reich: The Noor Inayat Khan Story
results.original_title: Enemy of the Reich: The Noor Inayat Khan Story
results.overview: In 1943, Noor Inayat Khan was recruited as a covert operative into Winston Churchill's Special Operations Executive. With an American mother and Indian Muslim father, she was an extremely unusual British agent. After her network collapsed, Khan became the only surviving radio operator linking the British to the French Resistance in Paris, coordinating the airdrop of weapons and agents, and the rescue of downed Allied fliers.

results.title: The Enemy’s Lullaby
results.overview: Khojaly tragedy through the eyes of a 5-year-old girl who became a victim of genocide. Little Aya asks her mother questions during the Khojaly tragedy. Aya, who does not understand the events that took place and does not know what happened to her mother, searches for answers to these questions throughout the film.

results.title: Godzilla: Ancient Enemy - The M.U.T.O.S
results.overview: A documentary short featured on the DVD release of Godzilla (2014).
